controls.label: Does your business have a Customer Due Diligence — Government Bodies process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Customer Due Diligence — Government Bodies process in place. You must establish a documented Customer Due Diligence — Government Bodies process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program include risk-based systems and controls to enable reasonable satisfaction that notified government bodies exist and (where applicable) have provided beneficial ownership information?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based systems and controls
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure for government bodies does not include sufficient risk-based systems and controls to enable reasonable satisfaction about entity existence and beneficial ownership information. Implement appropriate risk-based controls that allow you to verify these matters before commencing a designated service, as required under rules 4.8.2, 4.8.2(1), and 4.8.2(2).

controls.label: Does your procedure collect minimum KYC information for all government body customers (full name, principal place of operations address, Commonwealth status, and State/Territory/foreign country status)?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you collect this minimum KYC information
controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not capture all mandatory information for government body customers. Update your procedure to collect the full name, principal place of operations address, Commonwealth entity status, and State/Territory/foreign country designation for every government body customer before commencing a designated service, as required under rules 4.8.3(1), 4.8.3(2), 4.8.3(3), and 4.8.3(4).

checklist-items.label: Jurisdiction
checklist-items.note: Commonwealth, State, Territory, or foreign country

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to collect additional KYC information beyond the minimum requirements?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based approach to collecting additional KYC information
controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information should be collected for government body customers. Implement a risk-based decision-making process that evaluates each customer and determines what additional information, if any, is necessary to manage money laundering and terrorism financing risk, as required under rule 4.8.4.

controls.label: Does your procedure verify minimum KYC information about government bodies from reliable and independent documentation, electronic data, or a combination of both?
controls.detail-label: Describe your verification methods and documentation sources
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not establish a documented process for verifying government body information from reliable and independent sources. Implement a procedure that verifies the full name, principal place of operations, and government entity status from reliable documentation, electronic data, or a combination of both, as required under rule 4.8.5.

checklist-items.label: Jurisdiction
checklist-items.note: Commonwealth, State, Territory, or foreign country

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to verify any additional KYC information collected about government bodies?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based approach to verifying additional KYC information
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information should be verified for government body customers. Implement a risk-based decision-making process that evaluates each additional piece of information collected and determines whether and how it should be verified from reliable sources, as required under rule 4.8.6.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to collect KYC information about the ownership or control of foreign government bodies?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based approach to collecting beneficial ownership information
controls.remediation: Your Beneficial Ownership Identification procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to collect ownership or control information for foreign government body customers. Implement a risk-based decision-making process that evaluates the specific risks posed by each foreign government customer and determines what beneficial ownership information, if any, should be collected, as required under rule 4.8.7.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to verify collected beneficial ownership information about foreign government bodies from reliable and independent sources?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based approach to verifying beneficial ownership information
controls.remediation: Your Beneficial Ownership Identification procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether collected beneficial ownership information should be verified for foreign government body customers. Implement a risk-based decision-making process that evaluates the risks and determines what verification methods should be used, including reliable documentation, electronic data, or a combination of both, as required under rule 4.8.8.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies arising during verification of government body information?
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not establish a clear process for managing discrepancies discovered during verification of government body information. Implement risk-based systems and controls that enable you to respond to discrepancies and determine whether you can be reasonably satisfied about entity existence and beneficial ownership, as required under rule 4.8.9.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: Customer Due Diligence Obligation for Government Bodies
groups.description: Compliance requirements for AML/CTF programs serving government body customers under Part 4.8 of the AML/CTF Rules.

groups.title: Risk-Based Systems and Controls
groups.description: Systems and controls to enable reasonable satisfaction about government body existence and beneficial ownership.

groups.title: Collection of KYC Information
groups.description: Procedures for collecting minimum and additional KYC information about government body customers.

groups.title: Verification of Information
groups.description: Procedures for verifying government body information from reliable and independent sources.

groups.title: Beneficial Ownership for Foreign Government Bodies
groups.description: Risk-based procedures for collecting and verifying beneficial ownership information about foreign government entities.

groups.title: Discrepancy Handling
groups.description: Procedures for responding to discrepancies identified during verification of government body information.
